top.name: Rewrite History
top.rules_text: Choose any 3 spells from either player's discard. Cast them all with targets of your choice in any order for free.

bottom.name: Singularity
bottom.rules_text: Create a Singularity on target tile (indestructible). All spells within range 3 are pulled toward it: they resolve on the Singularity's tile instead. Units within 2 are pulled 1 tile toward it each turn. Lasts 3 turns.

channel.name: Singularity (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Range is 5 and pull is 2 tiles
